description: Composition Grey black checked shirt made of blended cotton fabric, has a spread collar, full buttoned placket, elatication at the sides of the midriff, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a mid-arm button and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Dry inside out Do not bleach or wring Warm iron Strikingly chic, reminiscent of a vintage vibe, this shirt from femella is a detail-oriented deconstruction of a wardrobe essential. Pared down to the basics, with a structured silhouette, pair this with a pencil skirt and pumps. For a formal or casual feel wear this with denims or formal pants. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
